title: Transform Test and Measurement Workflows by Leveraging Generative AI | Soliton Technologies
summary: This source is a corporate webpage from Soliton Technologies showcasing their generative AI solutions for test and measurement workflows. It presents key AI-driven capabilities including automatic generation of test programs from specifications, intelligent data analysis and visualization, an enterprise agentic framework for autonomous decision-making, and AI-assisted root cause analysis. Use cases include generating test programs for semiconductor validation, natural language access to engineering data, automated datasheet comprehension, and converting requirements into Gherkin test plans. The vision outlines a secure, scalable AI platform that integrates foundation models to enhance product development and testing efficiency.
author: Soliton Technologies
